creator: meta@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 190571
patch

xrdp v0.9.5 has a bug that xrdp-sesman doesn't acknowledge terminated sessions.
The bug make session manager corrupted state and users who have terminated 
never be able to reconnect until reboot (or restarting xrdp-sesman).

Reported at:   https://github.com/neutrinolabs/xrdp/issues/1016
Patch Obtained from: https://github.com/neutrinolabs/xrdp/issues/1030
